perksWithImages.name: Ace in the Hole
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever you loot an item from a Chest, it will have:
  • A Visceral or lower rarity add-on.
  • {Tunable.S07P03.ModifyChestItemSecondAddonChance%}% chance for an Uncommon or lower rarity add-on.


When you escape, you keep your add-ons.

perksWithImages.name: Hex: Wretched Fate
perksWithImages.description:
The first time a Generator is completed, a Dull Totem ignites.

The Obsession:
  • Repairs {Tunable.K37P01.RepairSpeedPenalty%}% slower.
  • Sees the Hex Totem's Aura within {Tunable.K37P01.AuraRevealDistance}m.

perksWithImages.name: Teamwork: Toughen Up
perksWithImages.description:
While injured, whenever another Survivor within {Tunable.S47P03.RequiredDistance}m of you blinds or Pallet-stuns the Killer, for {Tunable.S47P03.Duration}s:
  • You make no Grunts of Pain.
  • You leave no Pools of Blood.
  • You leave no Scratch Marks.

perksWithImages.name: Thanatophobia
perksWithImages.description:
For each injured, downed, or hooked Survivor, all Survivors:
  • Cleanse totems {Tunable.K04P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerSurvivor%}% slower.
  • Repair {Tunable.K04P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerSurvivor%}% slower.
  • Sabotage Hooks {Tunable.K04P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyPerSurvivor%}% slower.


While 4 Survivors are either injured, downed or hooked, all above actions are additionally {Tunable.K04P02.ActionSpeedPenaltyBonus%}% slower.
